summary: Tested LMS learner authentication features. All 18 backend tests PASSED (100%). Frontend learner portal fully functional with login modal showing both email and password fields, successful login, module view with images.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (learner portal login, dashboard, module view all working)

seed_data_creation: Test user test@example.com with password testpass123 already exists
context_for_next_testing_agent: LMS learner authentication fully working. Learner portal at /api/training/ has login modal with email AND password fields. Test user test@example.com/testpass123 can login successfully. Module images display correctly. Admin module endpoint /api/lms/admin/module/{id} returns full quiz data including questions, options, correct answers, and explanations.

learner_portal_ui_at_api_training.details: Learner portal loads at /api/training/ with Radio Check logo, hero stats (14 modules, 16 hours, Free)

login_modal_with_password.details: Login modal shows BOTH email AND password fields. Password input id='loginPassword' present.

learner_login_api.details: Login with email+password works correctly. Returns token and learner info.

learner_set_password_api.details: Validates password match, minimum length, rejects already-set passwords, rejects non-existent users

module_images_in_learner_portal.details: Module images display correctly in learner portal module view. Tested with module m1-intro which has image_url.

admin_module_endpoint_returns_quiz.details: Returns full module data including quiz with questions, options, correct answers, and explanations. Critical modules (m3-ethics) show 100% pass rate requirement.

quiz_display_in_admin.details: Admin module endpoint returns quiz data correctly. Admin portal login was not testable with provided credentials (admin@veteran.dbty.co.uk returned 401). The quiz data structure is verified via direct API testing.

ui_tests_summary.learner_portal_landing: PASS - Radio Check logo, Peer to Peer Training visible, 14 modules shown
ui_tests_summary.login_modal: PASS - Email AND Password fields visible
ui_tests_summary.dashboard: PASS - Shows 14 module cards, user name 'Test User'
ui_tests_summary.module_view: PASS - Module image displays, Take Quiz button present
